company.name: SGB ENGINEERING & TRADING PTE. LTD.

coverImage.altText: SGB ENGINEERING & TRADING PTE. LTD reference image

overviewParagraphs: The company has extensive experience in procurement, installation, rectification works, and project management, deliveringprojects acrossmultiplesectors.
Today, SGB operates as both amain contractor andsubcontractor for small to medium-sized projects, providing end-to-end project execution.
SGBis committed to quality, reliability, and long-term client relationships, resultingin repeat business and referrals.

hero.title: Singapore-based electrical, communication, and security systems execution
hero.summary: SGB Engineering & Trading supports procurement, installation, rectification works, and project management for small to medium-sized projects as both main contractor and subcontractor.
